'''rajutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cecidology|cecidology]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-j-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cecidology|cecidology]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| rajutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræjitith|ræjitith]] || [[word:ræjitij|ræjitij]] || [[word:ræjitish|ræjitish]] || [[word:ræjiti|ræjiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rajujututh|rajujututh]] || [[word:rajujutuj|rajujutuj]] || [[word:rajujutush|rajujutush]] || [[word:rajujutu|rajujutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rajututh|rajututh]] || [[word:rajutuj|rajutuj]] || [[word:rajutush|rajutush]] || [[word:rajutu|rajutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rajuftuth|rajuftuth]] || [[word:rajuftuj|rajuftuj]] || [[word:rajuftush|rajuftush]] || [[word:rajuftuf|rajuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rajututhu|rajututhu]] || [[word:rajutuju|rajutuju]] || [[word:rajutushu|rajutushu]] || [[word:rajutuku|rajutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rajututh|rajututh]] || [[word:rajutuj|rajutuj]] || [[word:rajutush|rajutush]] || [[word:rajutu|rajutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rajututhul|rajututhul]] || [[word:rajutujul|rajutujul]] || [[word:rajutushul|rajutushul]] || [[word:rajutukul|rajutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rajututhuthu|rajututhuthu]] || [[word:rajutujuju|rajutujuju]] || [[word:rajutushushu|rajutushushu]] || [[word:rajutuku|rajutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rajututhun|rajututhun]] || [[word:rajutujun|rajutujun]] || [[word:rajutushun|rajutushun]] || [[word:rajutukun|rajutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rajututhuoro|rajututhuoro]] || [[word:rajutujuoro|rajutujuoro]] || [[word:rajutushuoro|rajutushuoro]] || [[word:rajutukuoro|rajutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
